title: Bare Bones x Flower Ores
description: Replace your normal Minecraft ores with some really floral ores! And with the Bare Bones base 🌸
body:
Replace your normal Minecraft ores with some really floral ores! And with the Bare Bones base 🌸

Changed ores:
- All Overworld ores
- All Nether ores

Part of the Flower Power set 🌸

- Recommended to bundle with the [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) Texturepack for a better experience!
